note: cost_tracker.json absent — using architecture estimates from CLAUDE.md. Bot offline Day 75 — no live LLM calls.

roi_analysis.interpretation: All-time ROI is strong (140x) but recent 100 trades show deeply negative ROI (-120x). LLM cost is not the problem — trade PnL is.

downgrade_candidates.rationale: Recent 100 trades avg -$78/trade. Trade agent output quality is not generating positive EV. But Haiku downgrade may worsen directional thesis quality — need ablation test.

downgrade_candidates.recommendation: DO_NOT_DOWNGRADE — directional thesis quality likely critical. Fix the RR geometry first.

downgrade_candidates.rationale: Veto decisions saved money historically (HYPE LONG block, night block). Cannot attribute specific PnL to Critic without veto logging.
downgrade_candidates.roi_delta_estimate: UNKNOWN — veto outcomes not in CSV
downgrade_candidates.recommendation: DO_NOT_DOWNGRADE — Critic veto power is the primary protective mechanism. Value unclear but likely high.

upgrade_candidates.rationale: llm_regime field empty in ALL 965 CSV records. Regime classification may be failing. Sonnet may produce better regime labels.
upgrade_candidates.estimated_benefit: If regime accuracy improves +10%, expect +$18.7/month PnL (based on known regime-gated rules impact).
upgrade_candidates.recommendation: CONSIDER — conditional Sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT events only
